contract.name: CollateralXProtocolManager
contract.desc:
Protocol/vault manager skeleton.

Safety-critical assumption: this contract owns the protocol's canonical vault
boxes. Economic methods are intentionally stubs until grouped funding,
oracle validation, and ASA movement are implemented and audited.

methods.name: createApplication
methods.desc:
Sets the immutable bootstrap admin at application creation.
Protocol params are initialized separately so deployers can fund the app
account for boxes before vault creation starts.

methods.name: initializeProtocol
methods.desc: One-time protocol initialization. Only the bootstrap admin can call this.

methods.name: createVault
methods.desc:
Creates an empty vault owned by the sender and returns its deterministic id.
The caller must include box refs and the app account must already have MBR.

methods.name: readVault
methods.desc: Read a vault record by deterministic id. Requires the vault box ref.

methods.name: vaultExists
methods.desc: True when the vault box exists. Useful for frontends and keepers.

methods.name: readProtocolStatus
methods.desc: Returns protocol-wide counters, pause flags, and integration ids.

methods.name: adminSetParams
methods.desc: Admin-only full parameter update. Future governance can wrap this call.

methods.name: adminSetIntegrations
methods.desc: Admin-only integration pointer update for replaceable modules.

methods.name: adminSetPauseFlags
methods.desc: Admin-only replacement of the pause bitmask.

methods.name: adminTransfer
methods.desc: Admin transfer is explicit and logged for governance/indexers.

methods.name: depositCollateral
methods.desc: Future phase: grouped payment will increase collateral and aggregate TVL.

methods.name: mintStablecoin
methods.desc: Future phase: stablecoin controller will mint ASA units after risk checks.

methods.name: repay
methods.desc: Future phase: stablecoin ASA transfer will burn or escrow repayment.

methods.name: withdrawCollateral
methods.desc: Future phase: sends collateral back after preserving collateral ratio.

methods.name: liquidate
methods.desc: Future phase: called directly or by the liquidation executor app.
